reason: WEAVER LINE: Monday 20, Tuesday 21, Wednesday 22 and Thursday 23 July, after 2245 each evening, no service between Hackney Downs and Enfield Town / Cheshunt. Last through trains operate at 2213 from Liverpool Street to Cheshunt, 2250 from Enfield Town to Liverpool Street, 2258 from Liverpool Street to Enfield Town and 2259 from Cheshunt to Liverpool Street. Use Clapton for Rectory Road and Stoke Newington, and local London Buses services for Stamford Hill. Replacement buses operate.
